A selected handful

This is a slice —
not the whole roster.

We run marketing for far more artists than these. We kept it to a few clean cases instead of burying you in dozens — enough to make one thing clear: the results aren't luck. They repeat.

Why it matters11
What drives the numbers

A full-stack growth engine.

Streaming marketing
Editorial & algorithmic playlist strategy, catalog activation, chart pushes.
Content farm
High-volume short-form video at scale to seed and sustain reach.
Paid acquisition
TikTok & Meta Ads engineered for stream and sound conversion.
Content marketing
Narrative, creative direction and release-moment storytelling.
SMM & PR
Channel management and press activations around key drops.
Influencer & TikTok
Sound seeding and creator campaigns that turn into trends.
